# CTPF Documentation

> Evidence-first capability-trust experiments for agentic systems.

Canonical documentation: https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai
Repository: https://github.com/q-uestionable-AI/CTPF
Released package: `ctpf==0.14.0`
CLI: `ctpf`

## Research

- [Introduction](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/introduction): Project identity and current empirical scope
- [CTPF Concepts](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/concepts): Trust, authority, effects, and claim levels
- [Research Method](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/method/overview): Repeatable experimental contract
- [Observations and Scoring](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/method/observations-and-scoring): Conditions and fail-closed outcomes
- [Evidence and Integrity](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/method/evidence): Experiment records and bundle boundaries
- [Claims and Limitations](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/method/claims-and-limitations): Supported and prohibited conclusions
- [Responsible Use](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/responsible-use): Authorization and disclosure

## Experiments

- [Experiment Quickstart](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/quickstart): Run released cascade memo from `ctpf==0.14.0` (Python 3.11–3.13)
- [Cascade Memo](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/experiments/cascade-memo): Released two-session reference experiment
- [Pattern 2](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/experiments/pattern2): Unreleased source-only calibration experiment
- [Agent-Operable Lifecycle](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/experiments/agent-operable): Unreleased `control`/`govern` machine and human authority surfaces
- [Inference Targets](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/config/providers): Target pins and OS-keyring credentials
- [Targets CLI](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/cli/targets): Register model, runtime, and MCP targets

## Supporting Harness

- [Proxy Overview](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/proxy/overview): MCP observation and intervention infrastructure
- [Proxy CLI](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/proxy/cli): Start, replay, export, and inspect sessions
- [Session Evidence](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/proxy/session-export): Protocol session structure
- [MCP Transports](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/config/transports): stdio, SSE, and Streamable HTTP
- [Operational Runs](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/cli/runs): Stored operational records
- [Operational Findings](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/cli/findings): Stored secondary-library findings
- [Database](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/cli/db): Local database maintenance

## Frozen Audit Library

- [Audit Overview](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/audit/overview): Frozen enumeration and scanner library
- [Scanner Catalog](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/audit/scanners): Retained scanner implementations
- [Framework Coverage](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/audit/framework-coverage): Audit taxonomy mappings
- [SARIF](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/exports/sarif): Audit SARIF output
- [NDJSON](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/exports/ndjson): Audit finding export
- [CSV](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/exports/csv): Audit finding export

## Architecture and History

- [Architecture](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/architecture/overview): Current package responsibility boundaries
- [Operational Run Bundle](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/exports/json-schema): Compatibility database export, not experiment evidence
- [Changelog](https://ctpf.q-uestionable.ai/changelog): Append-only release history
